explanation: This property states that only while in PSV Mode, whenever the inspiratory flow drops below a fraction of the peak flow, the ventilator shall ensure the expiratory phase remains active until the patient requests a new breathing cycle. It strictly applies the context and continuous trigger with a persistent action.
decision2_substring: When the inspiratory flow (V_E) drops below a fraction of the peak flow (Expiratory Trigger Setting (ETS)) of a given breath (i.e., it yields the condition V_E<ETS*PeakV_E)
decision3_substring: the ventilator shall stop providing pressure allowing exhalation.

explanation: This property states that while in PSV Mode, whenever the inspiratory flow drops below a fraction of the peak flow, the ventilator shall ensure the inspiratory valve is closed and the expiratory valve is open until the patient requests a new breathing cycle. It uses continuous trigger monitoring with the physical mechanism as a persistent state.
decision2_substring: When the inspiratory flow (V_E) drops below a fraction of the peak flow (Expiratory Trigger Setting (ETS)) of a given breath (i.e., it yields the condition V_E<ETS*PeakV_E)
decision3_substring: the ventilator shall stop providing pressure allowing exhalation.
